title: Don't Kill Friends!
description: Protect your tamed animals from damage, even when you're offline! Lightweight plugin with HEX color support and full configurability for Minecraft 1.16.5-1.21.11.
body:
<center>

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/083db19a9e443727c993d4aeb667a102ccf16b2f.png)

[![Bukkit](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/bukkit_vector.svg)](https://dev.bukkit.org/)
[![Spigot](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/spigot_vector.svg)](https://www.spigotmc.org/)
[![Paper](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/paper_vector.svg)](https://papermc.io/)
[![Purpur](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/purpur_vector.svg)](https://purpurmc.org/)
[![Folia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba51b5b743e84007bb5a43211fac4d64a3d8c807.png)](https://papermc.io/software/folia)

# DontKillFriends

**Protect your tamed animals from damage, even when you're offline!**

DontKillFriends is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that prevents other players from harming your beloved pets. Whether you're online or offline, your tamed animals stay safe from both player attacks and environmental damage.

[![Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/project/dontkillfriends/gallery)
[![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://dsc.gg/exltdev)

</center>

## What it does

- Blocks player damage to tamed animals (wolves, cats, horses, parrots, and more)
- Protects offline players' pets — griefers can't touch them while the owner is away
- Shields pets from environmental damage: fire, lava, drowning, explosions, void, Warden sonic boom, and more
- Stops hostile mobs from targeting or attacking tamed pets
- Prevents tamed pets from fighting each other
- Intercepts `/kill` commands that would destroy named tamed mobs
- Notifies pet owners on login when someone tried to attack their animals

## Features

- **Offline protection** — pets stay safe when the owner is offline
- **Bypass permission** — `dontkillfriends.bypass` for admins
- **8 languages** — English, Russian, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese
- **HEX colors** — full `&#RRGGBB` color support in messages
- **Folia support** — works on regionized servers out of the box
- **Configurable** — toggle every damage type individually
- **Lightweight** — no database, minimal overhead
- **bStats opt-out** — disable metrics with `bstats: false`

## Commands

- `/dontkillfriends version` — show plugin version (`dontkillfriends.version`)
- `/dontkillfriends reload` — reload config and language (`dontkillfriends.reload`)
- `/dkf` — alias for `/dontkillfriends`

## Permissions

- `dontkillfriends.version` (op) — view plugin version
- `dontkillfriends.reload` (op) — reload configuration
- `dontkillfriends.bypass` (op) — bypass all pet protection

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.16.5 – 1.21.11
- **Platforms:** Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Folia
- **Java:** 8+
